textPlain: While I still use emacs, I find that that despite the "batteries included" narrative about emacs, the things which are not included are causes of major frustration.Such essential functionality like grep-find and LSP servers which is required for out of the box auto complete are not bundled with emacs. Most modern IDEs/editors have these functionality baked in.If you install emacs for windows Yiu find that grep-find doesn't work, because it depends on support from environment. A full text search should be built into the editor.
